title: Prisma Cloud - Find Public Cloud Resource by FQDN
content:
Find Public Cloud resources by FQDN using Prisma Cloud inventory

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — FQDN: FQDN to look up; CloudProvider: Public Cloud Provider (AWS, Azure, GCP).

Outputs — PrismaCloud.Attribution: Prisma Cloud attributed asset information..

Integrations/scripts used: GetDomainDNSDetails, SetAndHandleEmpty.
raw_yaml:
description: Find Public Cloud resources by FQDN using Prisma Cloud inventory
id: Prisma Cloud - Find Public Cloud Resource by FQDN
inputs:
- description: FQDN to look up
  key: FQDN
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: true
  value: {}
- description: Public Cloud Provider (AWS, Azure, GCP)
  key: CloudProvider
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: false
  value: {}
name: Prisma Cloud - Find Public Cloud Resource by FQDN
outputs:
- contextPath: PrismaCloud.Attribution
  description: Prisma Cloud attributed asset information.
  type: unknown
starttaskid: "0"
tasks:
  "0":
    id: "0"
    ignoreworker: false
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "20"
    note: false
    quietmode: 0
    separatecontext: false
    skipunavailable: false
    task:

      iscommand: false

      version: -1

    timertriggers: []
    type: start
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 1830,
          "y": -1210
        }
      }
  "2":
    conditions:
    - condition:
      - - left:
            iscontext: true
            value:
              complex:
                root: inputs.CloudProvider
          operator: inList
          right:
            value:
              simple: AWS,Amazon Web Services,Amazon
      label: AWS
    - condition:
      - - left:
            iscontext: true
            value:
              complex:
                root: inputs.CloudProvider
          operator: inList
          right:
            value:
              simple: Azure,Microsoft Azure
      label: Azure
    - condition:
      - - left:
            iscontext: true
            value:
              complex:
                root: inputs.CloudProvider
          operator: inList
          right:
            value:
              simple: GCP,Google Cloud Platform,Google
      label: GCP
    id: "2"
    ignoreworker: false

  "19":

    note: false
    quietmode: 0
    scriptarguments:
      append:
        simple: "false"
      key:
        simple: FQDN
      stringify: {}
      value:
        complex:
          root: inputs.FQDN
          transformers:
          - args:
              item:
                iscontext: true
                value:
                  simple: DomainDNSDetails.CNAME
            operator: append
          - args:
              regex:
                value:
                  simple: \.$
              replaceWith: {}
            operator: replaceMatch
          - operator: uniq
    separatecontext: false
    skipunavailable: false
    task:
      brand: ""
